reasoning: The August FIDE rating list was published on August 1st, and Wikipedia updates its rankings page to match. Since the 2025-08-17 baseline ranking is 16, the 2025-08-24 ranking will almost certainly be the exact same list and value (thus 16, logically 'as high or higher' being true). For subsequent dates, new monthly FIDE lists will apply. While Kosteniuk remains an active and strong Top 20 player, she faces significant downward pressure from rising stars (such as Divya Deshmukh, who recently broke into the Top 15 following the World Cup). Consequently, as time goes on, the probability of her maintaining or improving upon the #16 ranking steadily decreases due to both normal rating variance and a slight general age-related decline paired with younger players' upward momentum. Uncertainty is accordingly centered closer to 0.5 for the distant dates.
